design.name: Claude Design
design.hook: Anthropic launched Claude Design on April 17 — Opus 4.7-powered tool that generates prototypes, slides, and one-pagers from prompts while reading your codebase and design files to apply your design system. Research preview for Pro/Max/Team/Enterprise; Figma stock dropped 7.28% on launch day.

design.name: Claude Code Security
design.hook: Reasoning-based vulnerability scanner that found 500+ zero-days in production OSS, now in limited preview for Enterprise/Team and OSS maintainers.

design.name: CC-Beeper
design.hook: Floating macOS pager for Claude Code: see what agents are doing, respond by voice, and never miss a permission prompt. 100% Swift, zero dependencies, fully local, no telemetry — hit #6 on Product Hunt daily on April 15 with 220 upvotes.

design.name: Understand-Anything
design.hook: Trending since March 2026. Skill that turns any codebase or knowledge base into an interactive knowledge graph from inside Claude Code. ~8.6k stars by mid-April.

design.name: Masko Code
design.hook: Desktop mascot companion that watches your Claude Code agents and shows speech bubbles for permission requests — ships with Clippy and community mascots, or generate custom ones at masko.ai. Free, MIT-licensed, 100% local.

design.name: Anthropic OAuth third-party ban
design.hook: Anthropic clarifies that Free/Pro/Max OAuth tokens cannot be used in third-party tools (incl. its own Agent SDK) — ending the OpenClaw-era subscription resale loophole.

design.name: The Claude C Compiler
design.hook: Nicholas Carlini's parallel-Claude experiment: Opus 4.6 + agent teams produced a dependency-free Rust C compiler that boots Linux on x86/ARM/RISC-V.

design.name: naksha-studio
design.hook: Virtual design team plugin — 26 roles, 60 commands, 13.8k lines of curated design knowledge for Claude Code.

cost.name: rtk
cost.hook: Rust CLI proxy that strips noise from dev-command output before it hits the model — claims 60-90% token reduction. ~30k stars from Jan 22.

cost.name: caveman
cost.hook: "Why use many token when few token do trick" — the viral meme-skill (39.7k stars) that cuts ~65–75% output tokens and ~46% input tokens while preserving technical accuracy. Arjan Brussee's LinkedIn post spawned 30+ comments; launched on Product Hunt this week.
cost.install: claude plugin marketplace add JuliusBrussee/caveman && claude plugin install caveman@caveman

cost.name: code-review-graph
cost.hook: Trending since February 2026. MCP server (11.7k stars, v2.3.2 Apr 14) that builds an AST knowledge graph with tree-sitter + SQLite, delivering 6.8× fewer tokens on code reviews and up to 49× on daily tasks. Plugs straight into Claude Code's MCP config with a single pip install.
cost.install: pip install code-review-graph && code-review-graph install && code-review-graph build

cost.name: claude-mem
cost.hook: Plugin (46k+ stars, gained 3k in a single day) that auto-captures sessions, compresses them with the Claude Agent SDK, and injects relevant context at the start of the next session. Uses SQLite + Chroma vector search; cross-platform.

cost.name: Fast mode for Claude Opus 4.6
cost.hook: Same Opus 4.6 weights, ~2.5× faster output tokens/sec, priced 6× standard — toggle with /fast in Claude Code v2.1.36+.
cost.install: Inside Claude Code: /fast (then Tab to toggle)

cost.name: Claude for Open Source program
cost.hook: Six months of free Claude Max 20x ($1,200 value) for up to 10,000 OSS maintainers of repos with 5K+ stars or 1M+ monthly NPM downloads.

cost.name: claude-devtools
cost.hook: Visual UI for Claude Code session logs — turn-based context, compaction visualization, subagent execution trees, token-usage observability.

cost.name: claude-token-efficient
cost.hook: A single drop-in CLAUDE.md that slashes verbosity on heavy workflows. 4.5k stars in three weeks rode the late-March pricing-pain wave.

cost.name: cc-gateway
cost.hook: Privacy-preserving reverse-proxy gateway for Claude Code — fingerprint normalization, request rewriting, prompt-leak audit. 2.7k stars.

cost.name: 9router
cost.hook: Free router connecting Claude Code, Cursor and Cline to 40+ providers and 100+ models, auto-switching tiers when quotas die. ~2.7k stars.
cost.evidence: Created Jan 2026; 2,729 stars per GitHub search.

viral.name: gstack
viral.hook: Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup — 23 opinionated tools wired up as CEO/Designer/EM/QA personas. Hit ~78k stars from a March 11 creation, the breakout viral template of the month.

viral.name: everything-claude-code
viral.hook: Trending since January 2026. Full agent harness with 48 agents, 183 skills, hooks, rules and MCP configs. Hit ~162k stars three months after a Jan 18 creation.

viral.name: claude-code-best/claude-code
viral.hook: Runnable, TS-typed, bun-installable build of Claude Code that emerged hours after the March 31 source leak. ~16.4k stars in <3 weeks.

viral.name: ai-website-cloner-template
viral.hook: Clone any website with a single Claude Code command — template hit 12k stars in <3 weeks on the back of a viral demo thread.

viral.name: nanoclaw
viral.hook: Container-native alternative to OpenClaw — messaging integrations, memory, scheduled jobs, runs on Anthropic's Agents SDK. Exploded to ~28k stars from Jan 31.
viral.install: gh repo fork qwibitai/nanoclaw --clone && cd nanoclaw && claude

viral.name: paoloanzn/free-code
viral.hook: Post-leak 'free build of Claude Code' with telemetry and guardrails stripped — controversial but pulled ~8k stars within days.

viral.name: NanmiCoder/cc-haha
viral.hook: Cross-platform desktop Claude Code fork that bolts on Computer Use. Spawned in the post-leak rush, 7.2k stars in <3 weeks.

viral.name: claude-code-sourcemap
viral.hook: Annotated sourcemap of the leaked Claude Code internals — 8.95k stars, 14.5k forks in <3 weeks. Anchor of the post-leak research cluster.

viral.name: get-shit-done
viral.hook: Spec-driven meta-prompting system for Claude Code (55.2k stars, updated April 19) with five slash commands: /gsd-new-project, /gsd-plan-phase, /gsd-execute-phase, /gsd-spike, and /gsd-sketch. Enforces a structured plan-then-build loop that prevents runaway agent sessions.

viral.name: cmux
viral.hook: Ghostty-based macOS terminal with vertical tabs and notifications purpose-built for AI coding agents. ~15k stars since Jan 28.
viral.install: brew tap manaflow-ai/cmux && brew install --cask cmux

viral.name: claude-squad
viral.hook: Terminal app (7.1k stars) for managing multiple Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini agents in parallel — each in its own isolated git workspace with a tmux pane. Supports any agent that speaks the Claude Code protocol.

viral.name: Claude Code Remote Control
viral.hook: Run a local Claude Code session, then drive it from claude.ai/code, iOS, or Android — execution stays on your machine, prompts flow from anywhere.

viral.name: Pragmatic Engineer Survey: Claude Code most-loved
viral.hook: Survey of ~1,000 devs (Jan 27–Feb 17) crowns Claude Code the #1 most-loved tool at 46%, vs Cursor 19% and Copilot 9%; 95% of devs use AI weekly.

viral.name: claude-code-book
viral.hook: 420k-word Chinese book reverse-engineering Claude Code as an Agent Harness — landed at the post-leak peak with 2.8k stars.

viral.name: ralphy
viral.hook: Autonomous bash loop that runs Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Qwen and Droid against a PRD until it's done. ~2.8k stars.

general.name: Claude Cowork
general.hook: Anthropic's Jan 12 research preview — Claude Code for knowledge workers. Direct permission-based access to local files from the macOS app.
general.install: # macOS desktop app — enable from claude.ai settings
general.evidence: Launched Jan 12 to Max, widened to Pro by Jan 16. Mostly built by Claude Code.

general.name: Claude Opus 4.6
general.hook: First Opus-class model with a 1M-token context window plus 'agent teams' that let multiple Claude Code agents work in parallel — released Feb 5.

general.name: Claude Sonnet 4.6
general.hook: New default Sonnet at $3/$15 per MTok hits 79.6% on SWE-bench Verified with 1M-token context — released Feb 17.

general.name: Claude Opus 4.7
general.hook: Released April 16: 87.6% SWE-bench in new xhigh effort mode, 98.5% visual acuity, 3.75MP images (3× higher than Opus 4.6), and /ultrareview for parallel multi-agent cloud code review. Price unchanged at $5/M input, $25/M output; Auto mode now available to Max subscribers.

general.name: awesome-openclaw-skills
general.hook: VoltAgent's curated registry — 5,400+ OpenClaw skills filtered from 13,729 candidates. Jan 25 launch pulled ~47k stars.

general.name: Apple Xcode 26.3 + Claude Agent SDK
general.hook: Xcode ships native Claude Agent SDK integration — subagents, background tasks, plugins, and Preview-based visual verification for iOS/macOS/visionOS.
general.install: Update Xcode to 26.3 → Settings → Accounts → Claude

general.name: OpenAI codex-plugin-cc
general.hook: OpenAI ships an official Claude Code plugin — call Codex from inside CC for review or delegation. Cross-vendor moment of the month, 15.2k stars in ~3 weeks.

general.name: Claude Code v2.1.111–2.1.114
general.hook: Four releases in four days (Apr 15–18): CLI now spawns a native binary instead of bundled JS, sandbox network domain blocking, OSC 8 clickable URLs in terminal, /tui fullscreen mode, push notifications, /less-permission-prompts skill, and plan files auto-named after the prompt.

general.name: antigravity-awesome-skills
general.hook: Installable library of 1,400+ agentic skills covering Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI and Antigravity. ~34k stars from Jan 14.

general.name: Claude Cowork on Windows
general.hook: Cowork desktop reaches Windows with full feature parity — file access, MCP connectors, plugins — opening Anthropic's autonomous agent to ~70% of desktops.
general.install: Download Claude Desktop for Windows → switch to Cowork mode

general.name: oh-my-claudecode
general.hook: Teams-first multi-agent orchestration layer for Claude Code. ~30k stars since its Jan 9 release.

general.name: Anthropic acquires Vercept
general.hook: Seattle computer-use startup behind Vy joins Anthropic to advance Claude's desktop automation; Vercept product sunset March 25.

general.name: slavingia/skills
general.hook: Sahil Lavingia's 'Minimalist Entrepreneur' skill pack — opinionated solo-founder workflows. 8k+ stars, broadly forked as a personal-skills starter.

general.name: Claude in PowerPoint expands to Pro
general.hook: Template-aware slide co-author lands on the $20/mo Pro tier — read existing decks, edit with brand-respecting precision, generate full structures from a prompt.

general.name: last30days-skill
general.hook: Research skill that pulls 30-day signal from Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket and the web into a grounded summary. ~23k stars from Jan 23.

general.name: Anthropic + Infosys partnership
general.hook: Joint Center of Excellence to build Claude-powered agents for telecom, financial services, manufacturing, and software dev in regulated industries.

general.name: claude-hud
general.hook: Statusline plugin showing context usage, active tools, running agents and todo progress. ~20k stars since Jan 2.

general.name: Cowork enterprise plugin marketplaces
general.hook: 10 department plugin packs + 12 new MCP connectors (Google Workspace, DocuSign, FactSet, Harvey…) and a 'Customize' admin UI for private internal marketplaces.

general.name: ARIS — Auto-claude-code-research-in-sleep
general.hook: Markdown-only autonomous ML research skill — overnight idea/experiment/eval loops. Kicked off the March 'autoresearch' wave, 7k+ stars.

general.name: planning-with-files
general.hook: Skill that implements Manus-style persistent markdown planning — the workflow pattern behind the $2B acquisition. ~19k stars from Jan 3.

general.name: anthropics/financial-services-plugins
general.hook: Anthropic's first official vertical plugin pack — ~7.7K stars, MCP-backed integrations for finserv workflows like equity research and compliance review.

general.name: agency-agents-zh
general.hook: 211 plug-and-play AI expert personas across 18 departments — the Chinese-localized agency pack everyone forked in March.

general.name: baoyu-skills
general.hook: Jim Liu's content + image-gen skill bundle — infographics, slides, social publishing, nine image providers. ~15k stars from Jan 13.

general.name: web-access
general.hook: Three-tier web/CDP/parallel skill that gives Claude Code robust internet access without third-party MCPs. 5.3k+ stars.

general.name: hive
general.hook: Zero-setup harness that auto-generates multi-agent topologies for long-running workflows. ~10k stars since Jan 12.

general.name: claude-code-plugins-plus-skills
general.hook: Open-source marketplace index with 423 plugins, 2,849 skills, and 177 agents (2k+ stars). The ccpi CLI lets you search and install anything from the index with a single command.

general.name: trailofbits/skills
general.hook: Trail of Bits ships 40+ security skills — smart-contract scanners, YARA authoring, Android APK checks, differential code audits. ~4.7k stars.

general.name: codebase-to-course
general.hook: Skill that converts any codebase into a self-paced interactive HTML course — ~3.9k stars from a single tweet.

general.name: awesome-claude-plugins (ComposioHQ)
general.hook: Curated list of 40+ Claude Code plugins (1.4k stars) led by connect-apps — a flagship plugin with 500+ integration connectors — plus frontend-design, CCHub, and other high-signal picks.

general.name: antfu/skills
general.hook: Anthony Fu's curated skills — Vue, Nuxt, Vite, Vitest, Pinia, UnoCSS, pnpm — hand-tuned plus generated from upstream docs. ~4.6k stars.

general.name: autoresearch
general.hook: Karpathy-style autonomous goal-directed iteration skill — second hit in the March autoresearch surge with ~3.9k stars.

general.name: levnikolaevich/claude-code-skills
general.hook: Full dev lifecycle plugin suite (413 stars): 7 core plugins covering planning through deployment, plus three MCP servers (hex-line, hex-graph, hex-ssh) for graph visualization and remote SSH sessions inside Claude Code.

general.name: open-claude-cowork
general.hook: Composio's open-source take on Claude Cowork with 500+ SaaS integrations. Shipped Jan 13, day after Anthropic's preview.

general.name: Waza
general.hook: Engineering habits packaged as runnable Claude skills — code review, debugging, refactor playbooks. 3.6k stars.

general.name: claude-code-ultimate-guide
general.hook: 24k lines of docs, 228 templates, 271 quiz questions and a built-in MCP server you can point Claude Code at. ~3.7k stars from Jan 9.

general.name: claude-scholar
general.hook: Research assistant covering ideation → literature → experiments → writing, with Zotero and Obsidian integrations. ~3.4k stars.
general.evidence: Created Jan 2026; 3,448 stars per GitHub search.

general.name: Superpowers (obra)
general.hook: 20+ composable skills enforcing clarify→design→plan→code→verify discipline — exploded to 55K+ stars in Feb after Anthropic accepted it into the official marketplace.

general.name: harness
general.hook: Meta-plugin that designs domain-specific agent teams and generates their skills on the fly. 2.7k stars in two weeks.

general.name: addyosmani/agent-skills
general.hook: Addy Osmani (Google) drops production-grade engineering skills compatible with Claude Code, Cursor, and Antigravity — ~18K stars in weeks.

general.name: claude-octopus
general.hook: Puts up to 8 models on every coding task so blind spots surface before you ship. Plugin form, ~2.8k stars from Jan 15.

general.name: mattpocock/skills
general.hook: Matt Pocock's personal `.claude/skills` directory becomes the most-cloned creator-driven skill collection of the month — ~16.5K stars.

general.name: HolyClaude
general.hook: Dockerized AI coding workstation: Claude Code + 7 sibling CLIs + headless browser + 50+ tools, ready to spin up. 2k stars.

general.name: Anthropic Cybersecurity Skills
general.hook: 754 cybersecurity skills mapped to MITRE ATT&CK and NIST CSF — riding the Claude Code Security wave to ~5K stars.

general.name: mcp-brasil
general.hook: MCP server bundling 41 Brazilian public-data and government APIs (CNPJ, CEP, Receita, BCB) into one install. 1.4k stars.

general.name: ouroboros
general.hook: Spec-driven harness — interview, seed, execute, evaluate, evolve — with nine specialized agents and 3-stage evaluation gates. ~2.4k stars.

general.name: Claude Plugins Community
general.hook: Read-only mirror of Anthropic's official curated community plugin marketplace. Submission pipeline at clau.de/plugin-directory-submission.

general.name: agent-of-empires
general.hook: Rust TUI + web dashboard for managing many Claude Code / OpenCode / Codex sessions via tmux and git worktrees. ~1.6k stars.

general.name: engram
general.hook: Persistent agent memory MCP server in Go + SQLite — tools for store/recall/forget across sessions, riding Feb's memory-layer wave.

general.name: awesome-claude-code-toolkit
general.hook: Most comprehensive toolkit of the month — 135 agents, 35 skills, 176+ plugins, 14 MCP configs. Heavy March commit cadence.

general.name: drift
general.hook: MCP server that learns codebase patterns and remembers decisions across sessions. Offline CLI, works in any IDE. ~780 stars from Jan 19.
general.install: # MCP — see repo README for server config

general.name: context-mode
general.hook: Claude Code plugin that sandboxes tool output via PreToolUse/PostToolUse hooks — claims 98% context-window reduction across 12 platforms.

general.name: lean-ctx
general.hook: Rust binary positioning itself as a 99%-cost-cut MCP + shell-hook layer for 24+ coding agents. 695 stars in three weeks.

general.name: mcp-security-hub
general.hook: FuzzingLabs' collection of MCP servers wiring offensive tools — Nmap, Ghidra, Nuclei, SQLMap, Hashcat — into AI assistants. ~525 stars.

general.name: Composio agent-orchestrator
general.hook: Parallel coding-agent orchestrator from Composio — coordinates Claude Code subagents on CI fixes and merge-conflict resolution. ~6.4K stars.
